plugins.name: lakebase-app-dev-kit
plugins.description: Lakebase app dev kit: git-Lakebase branch-pairing, schema diff, PR flow, and the TDD state-machine workflow. Run /lakebase-app-dev-kit:tdd to launch the TDD workflow (resumes in a scaffolded project, guides creation elsewhere). Ships the role agents (scrum-master orchestrator + product-owner, spec-author, architect-reviewer, test-strategist, ux-designer, navigator, driver, release-engineer).
